title: astragalus monspessulanus subsp. wulfenii
intro: Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. wulfenii, also known as Wulfen's milk-vetch, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immune-modulating effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. wulfenii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, thereby providing relief from conditions such as arthritis, high blood pressure, and respiratory infections. Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. wulfenii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
